Yes. We offer gift cards, but I do not have a gift-wrap service to promise for physical items. For shipping, standard delivery is free, Express is $8, and Overnight is $25. Most orders ship within 2 business days, Express has a 2 pm CST cutoff, Overnight has a 12 pm cutoff, and boots, heels, loafers, and work shoes are excluded from Express and Overnight. If you want it there fast, standard is free and upgrading at checkout is your quickest move.
